audit_items.proof_trace: Race condition between device removal and I/O operations leads to UAF. aspeed_peci_check_idle() accesses priv->rst without synchronization while device removal can trigger devres cleanup and free the reset control. The device_unregister() call in unregister_controller() does not wait for pending aspeed_peci_xfer() operations.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers PECI I/O operation while simultaneously causing device removal (e.g., module unload), causing reset_control_assert() to dereference freed memory in aspeed_peci_check_idle().
